---
title: "Molecules of pharmacological interest"
---

[![Paracetamol is classified as a mild analgesic for pain relief.](paracetamol.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC(=O)NC1=CC=C(C=C1)O)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paracetamol)
</p>

[![Ibuprofen can be used for symptomatic relief of migraines and acts as a anti-inflammatory.](ibuprofeno.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC(C)CC1=CC=C(C=C1)C(C)C(=O)O)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ibuprofen)
</p>

[![Amoxicillin is an antibiotic used to treat a variety of bacterial infections.](amoxicilina.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?mode l=CC1(%5BC@@H%5D(N2%5BC@H%5D(S1)%5BC@@H%5D(C2=O)NC(=O)%5BC@@H%5D(C3=CC=C(C=C3)O)N)C(=O)O)C)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amoxicillin)
</p>

[![Metformin is used in the treatment of type 2 diabetes.](metformina.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CN(C)C(=N)N=C(N)N)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Metformina)
</p>
